message:
fix(abi): resolve 6 remaining clippy warnings in glibc_internal_abi

- Remove redundant pointer casts in pidfd_spawn/pidfd_spawnp (argv/envp
  already *const *mut c_char)
- Remove redundant Cell::as_ptr() cast (returns *mut T, not *const T)
- Add parentheses around FUTEX_CLOCK_REALTIME multiplication for
  operator precedence clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
